checklist.evidence: grep confirms input present in devflow.yml, devflow-implement.yml, devflow-runner.yml

checklist.claim: runner sources value only from trusted steps.baseprovision ($BASE_JSON), never PR-head
checklist.evidence: extraction pipes $BASE_JSON; with: references steps.baseprovision; no cfg.outputs/needs.config on the input line

checklist.claim: empty/absent/non-object/non-string setup.claude_code_executable resolves to empty string (auto-install)
checklist.evidence: executable jq sweep over shape matrix; array leaf -> empty + single-line (post-fix)

checklist.claim: action treats empty path_to_claude_code_executable as absent (auto-install)
checklist.evidence: action.yml: default '', empty string treated as not provided -> automatic installation (WebFetch verified)
schema type string with description; example value ""

phase3_findings.description: non-string setup.claude_code_executable leaf (array/object) makes jq -r pretty-print multi-line, corrupting the key=value GITHUB_OUTPUT line; neither // empty nor try/catch fires
AC3 trust-boundary negative pin was a two-token blocklist trippable by a comment line; no positive pin that the runner extraction reads the trusted $BASE_JSON
schema/docs say 'absolute path' but the action accepts any path (over-specification)
no stderr breadcrumb when a present non-string value is dropped; on a Windows runner auto-install then aborts, masking the config typo

fix_decisions.claim_text: no stderr breadcrumb when a present non-string value is dropped to empty
fix_decisions.evidence: below the important fix threshold (defense-in-depth); the | strings fix already prevents the real GITHUB_OUTPUT-corruption bug. Adding a stderr breadcrumb to the workflow config-extraction line adds complexity to a hot config path for a clear misconfiguration (a documented string key set to a non-string) whose auto-install fallback already fails loud on the Windows runner it targets.

parking_evidence.basis: advisory defense-in-depth below the important fix threshold; the primary corruption bug is fixed by | strings
parking_evidence.failing_input: a hand-edited config setting setup.claude_code_executable to a non-string value on a self-hosted Windows runner
